headline: ServiceNow’s HR Chief Looks to Middle Managers to Ease AI Anxiety
summary: ServiceNow Chief People and AI Enablement Officer Jacqui Canney says ignoring job anxiety and treating well-being as an afterthought will doom corporate AI strategies.

raw.headline: ServiceNow’s HR Chief Looks to Middle Managers to Ease AI Anxiety
raw.summary: ServiceNow Chief People and AI Enablement Officer Jacqui Canney says ignoring job anxiety and treating well-being as an afterthought will doom corporate AI strategies.

headline: The Role of "AI Enablement" in HR
summary: Jacqui Canney, ServiceNow chief people and AI enablement officer, discusses her company’s belief that HR can drive AI adoption through a people-first enablement strategy rather than a purely technical or productivity-focused one.

raw.headline: The Role of "AI Enablement" in HR
raw.summary: Jacqui Canney, ServiceNow chief people and AI enablement officer, discusses her company’s belief that HR can drive AI adoption through a people-first enablement strategy rather than a purely technical or productivity-focused one.

headline: NowVertical Group Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Release Date and Financial Update Webinar
summary: TORONTO, March 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NowVertical Group Inc. (TSXV: NOW) ("NowVertical" or the "Company"), a leading data and AI solutions provider, will announce its 2025 fourth quarter and full year financial results before the market open on Thursday, April 9, 2025. This will be followed by a webinar at 11:00 AM ET (8:00 AM PT) on Thursday, April 9, 2025, to discuss the Company's financial results and provide a business outlook. Q4 and FY 2025 Financial Results Investor Webinar: NOW inv

headline: Blue Owl Looks Incredibly Cheap, And That's Not A Compliment (Downgrade)

headline: Virtus SGA Global Growth Fund: Q4 2025 Buys, Sells, And Standouts
summary: Virtus SGA's Q4 report highlights gains in Alphabet and TSMC alongside shifts in Microsoft and MercadoLibre. Read the full analysis for more details.
